topics.title: Individual Variability in Brain Connectivity Dynamics
topics.description: This cluster focuses on how functional and dynamic connectivity patterns vary across individuals, tasks, and brain states, including their reliability and relationship to cognition. It also includes approaches for precision mapping and individualized parcellation in the human brain.

topics.title: Neurodegenerative Aging and Disease Progression
topics.description: This cluster centers on neurodegenerative disorders across the aging and preclinical spectrum, especially Alzheimer disease, Parkinson disease, and mild cognitive impairment. It emphasizes disease progression, cognitive decline, and biological markers such as amyloid burden, tau, apoe, brain age, and atrophy.

topics.title: Transdiagnostic Psychopathology Across Youth Disorders
topics.description: This cluster centers on overlapping psychiatric conditions in youth, especially schizophrenia, depression, bipolar disorder, psychosis, and PTSD. It emphasizes developmental risk factors such as childhood trauma and adversity, along with related psychopathology and suicidal ideation.

topics.title: Neonatal and Childhood Brain Development
topics.description: This cluster centers on brain development across the neonatal period, infancy, childhood, and adolescence, with emphasis on preterm birth and its cognitive outcomes. It highlights white matter, brain microstructure, cortical structure, and connectivity as key developmental features.

topics.title: Neural Representations in Motor and Visual Cognition
topics.description: This cluster centers on fMRI studies of how the human brain represents imagery, action observation, attention, and working memory. It emphasizes neural correlates and decoding of motor and visual processes in primary motor and visual cortex.

topics.title: Open, Reproducible Neuroimaging Pipelines
topics.description: This cluster centers on neuroimaging workflows and software infrastructure for reproducible analysis, including standardized pipelines and open science tools. It also includes deep learning methods and diverse MRI applications spanning ultra-low-field, diffusion, and high-field imaging.

topics.title: Emotion Regulation and Social Affective Neuroscience
topics.description: This cluster focuses on neural and behavioral mechanisms underlying emotion regulation, social cognition, and affective processing across anxiety- and depression-related conditions. It highlights roles of the amygdala, stress, interoception, and related traits such as empathy and alexithymia.

topics.title: Neural Bases of Language and Reading
topics.description: This cluster centers on how the brain supports language, speech, reading, and comprehension, with attention to disorders such as aphasia, dyslexia, and dyscalculia. It also includes studies of neural encoding and network organization underlying these functions, often using fMRI.

topics.title: High-Resolution fMRI Methods and Cerebrovascular Mapping
topics.description: The cluster centers on high-field and high-resolution fMRI approaches, including protocol optimization, denoising, and artifact management. It also emphasizes cerebrovascular reactivity, coupling, and mapping strategies across different field strengths and species.

topics.title: Epileptic Networks and Seizure Localization
topics.description: This cluster centers on epilepsy, especially focal and pediatric forms, with emphasis on identifying the epileptogenic and seizure onset zones. It also highlights network alterations and effective connectivity changes associated with epileptic pathology.

topics.title: Lesion Predictors of Post-Injury Recovery
topics.description: This cluster centers on neurological disorders and how lesions, structural disconnection, and network effects relate to functional recovery and clinical outcomes. It emphasizes prediction of motor, cognitive, and language impairments after stroke, traumatic brain injury, and multiple sclerosis.

topics.title: Neuromodulation Targets and Outcomes
topics.description: This cluster centers on therapeutic neuromodulation for movement and psychiatric disorders, especially deep brain stimulation, transcranial stimulation, and focused ultrasound approaches. It also includes imaging and connectivity studies used to characterize targets, efficacy, and treatment response.

topics.title: Autism Brain Development in Youth
topics.description: This cluster centers on autism and related developmental phenotypes in children and adolescents, emphasizing autistic traits, symptoms, and severity. The abstracts focus on brain abnormalities and functional or structural alterations underlying behavior across development.

topics.title: Neurocircuitry of craving and addiction
topics.description: This cluster centers on addiction-related craving, cue reactivity, and reward/inhibitory control processes across substance use disorders. It also includes studies linking neural markers and behavior to alcohol, cannabis, opioid, and methamphetamine use.

keywords: brain metabolic networks underlying integration and disease
topics.title: Brain Metabolism in Metabolic Disorders
topics.description: This cluster centers on links between brain metabolism, glucose handling, and cognitive function across metabolic and eating disorders. It also highlights altered brain metabolic networks and bioenergetic abnormalities as potential markers of disease.

topics.title: Neural Signatures of Chronic Pain
topics.description: This cluster centers on chronic pain conditions and related syndromes such as fibromyalgia, trigeminal neuralgia, and widespread pain. It emphasizes pain perception, central sensitization, and brain-based markers and mechanisms underlying pain phenotypes.

keywords: localised high amplitude slow local sleep wave
topics.title: Human Sleep Dynamics and Consciousness
topics.description: This cluster centers on human sleep, especially NREM sleep structure, arousal transitions, and brain state dynamics linked to consciousness. It also includes multimodal measures of sleep physiology, connectivity, and glymphatic or cognitive effects such as insomnia-related memory impairment.

keywords: brain sensitivity across the menstrual cycle an eeg study
topics.title: Hormones, Sex Differences, and Brain Development
topics.description: This cluster centers on how hormonal states and sex differences shape brain structure, function, and cognition across development and later life. It includes menstrual cycle effects, adolescence, and the menopausal transition, with emphasis on neuroimaging and neuroendocrine findings.

keywords: intrinsic striatal functional brain connectivity signature of compulsivity
topics.title: OCD circuitry and treatment response
topics.description: This cluster centers on obsessive compulsive disorder, especially frontostriatal and cstc connectivity, compulsivity, and neural predictors of treatment response. It also includes studies of CBT, deep TMS, and related clinical outcomes in adolescent and comorbid cases.
